parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely AI-generated. The characters exhibit uncanny smoothness, perfectly static framing, and slightly unnatural lip-syncing. The lighting and backgrounds have a characteristic AI-rendered perfection.

characters.appearance: Black woman in her 30s with a dark complexion and short, curly black hair. She has a friendly, expressive face.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, eager to learn, slightly frustrated when making mistakes.

scenes.setting: Cozy living room environments for both characters, daytime, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A facing the camera directly. She is positioned in the center of the frame. The background is a cozy living room. Visible behind her are a wooden bookshelf, a floor lamp emitting a warm glow, a grey sofa draped with a yellow blanket, and a framed piece of art on the wall. The lighting is soft and natural, illuminating her face evenly. She maintains eye contact with the viewer.

A medium close-up of Character B facing the camera directly. She is centered in the frame. The background shows a comfortable living room environment. Behind her, there is a sofa with patterned throw pillows, a warm-toned lamp, and framed artwork hanging on the wall. The lighting is soft and flattering, creating a welcoming atmosphere. She maintains steady eye contact with the viewer.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout divided horizontally. The top half features Character A in a green shirt, while the bottom half shows Character B in a blue shirt. Both are situated in similar, warmly lit living room settings. They appear to be engaged in a video call. Throughout the video, dynamic text captions of their speech appear over their respective panels. Occasionally, graphic symbols like a green checkmark or a red 'X' pop up on the screen. At the end, a button graphic appears in the bottom panel.
